codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review of the O2C live-comment closure found the packet stayed focused on the remaining PR #97 issues: `DispatchController`, `SalesController`, `DispatchMetadataValidator`, `SalesCoreEngine`, and adjacent tests were updated together so factory dispatch rights, replay-before-metadata handling, omitted payment-mode preservation, and dispatch readiness all remained covered on the propagated branch. The diff is consistent with the feature brief and the milestone validators passed, so the packet is review-clean on reachable commit `c004cbbcdeb4cd099cb06ce0b685c56820f59e3b` (`fix(o2c): close remaining PR97 live review comments`).

summary: Pass. The main PR #97 review-closure packet stays clean on commit `c004cbbcdeb4cd099cb06ce0b685c56820f59e3b`, with the narrowed controller/core-engine fixes backed by targeted O2C regression tests.
